title: Fluffy Saudi Lentil Pasta
description: Buttery, fluffy pasta blended with smoky paprika and tender lentils, creating a festive, flexitarian dish that feels like a holiday centerpiece.
instructions: Rinse the lentils until the water runs clear.
Combine lentils, water, and vegetable broth in a pot, bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until tender.
Cook the pasta in a separate pot of salted boiling water for 8-10 minutes until al dente.
Melt butter with olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, then sauté onion and garlic until fragrant and translucent.
Add smoked paprika to the skillet, stirring for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Drain the cooked pasta, reserving 1 cup of pasta water, and add it to the skillet with the aromatics; stir to combine.
Fold in the cooked lentils and lemon juice, then whisk vigorously to create a creamy pasta-water emulsion, adding reserved pasta water as needed to reach desired consistency.
Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of cumin if desired, then simmer for 2 minutes so flavors meld.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh cilantro, and enjoy.
